highest_unemployment_state: Rajasthan has the highest average unemployment at 26.7%.
lowest_unemployment_state: Sikkim has the lowest average unemployment at 4.0%.
national_average: The national average unemployment rate is 9.9%.
trend_direction: Unemployment is on a declining trend over the analysis period.
peak_period: Peak unemployment occurred around April 2020 with 24.2%.
most_volatile_state: Tripura shows the highest unemployment volatility (std = 4.46%).
covid_impact: A significant spike is visible in mid-2020 across all states due to COVID-19 lockdowns.
recovery_observation: Post-2021, most states show a gradual recovery in employment conditions.
